raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citibank failed to recognize 12 fraudulent transactions on my Mastercard credit card, even though they all occurred within a short period of time ( XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) and with the same online merchant ( XXXX ). Of a total of 31 transactions, only 18 were recognized as fraudulent by Citibank. The amount not recognized as fraudulent amounts to {$420.00}, and my account was charged. 

Although I called to dispute these transactions, I was never given a case number. I was not informed of the resolution through adequate means : I only found out by seeing the charges on my statement and in the online banking dispute center. Furthermore, the phone service was poor : there were no XXXXspeaking representatives, background noise made communication impossible, and the assigned interpreter did not accurately translate what I or the agent said. Finally, I was also denied the names of the people who handled the case. 

Citibank told me that XXXX had to refund my money directly, which is not a valid remedy for unauthorized charges that clearly constitute fraud. 

I request that the CFPB intervene so that Citibank can review these transactions again and refund me the appropriate amount.
